info.name: Dllni - User Module (SMS OTP Auth) - v1
info.description:
## Base URL & prefix
- Collection variable `{{baseUrl}}` defaults to `http://Dllni.test` (Herd/Laragon).
- User API base path: `/api/v1/user` (routes file: `Modules/User/routes/api.php`).

## Authentication
- **Public**: register, login OTP steps, reset password, supermarket/restaurant discovery, **restaurant home** (categories, exclusive offers, suggested products, nearest restaurants), products, marketing offers, vote read, luck box, etc.
- **Sanctum**: set `{{token}}` from verify/login/reset responses; send `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` for `me`, `account`, `addresses`, **favorites** (restaurants + supermarket stores), `notifications`, cart, checkout, orders, **restaurants/home/latest-ordered-products**, supermarket **items CRUD**, supermarket order status, vote create/ballot/end.

## Favorites — المفضلة (authenticated)
Polymorphic rows in `favorites` (`favorable_type` = `Restaurant` or `SmStore`). List order: **most recently favorited first** (`favorites.created_at` desc).

| Path | Method | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/restaurants` | GET | Paginated `RestaurantResource`; query `perPage` (1–100, default 20), `page` |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/restaurants/{id}` | POST | No body. **201** first add, **200** if already favorited. Body: `{ "restaurant": … }`. **422** if restaurant not active. |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/restaurants/{id}` | DELETE | **204** empty body (safe if not favorited). |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/supermarket/stores` | GET | Paginated `SmStoreResource`; `perPage`, `page` |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/supermarket/stores/{id}` | POST | **201** / **200**; `{ "store": … }`. **422** if store inactive. |
| `/api/v1/user/favorites/supermarket/stores/{id}` | DELETE | **204** |

## Restaurant homepage (`GET /api/v1/user/restaurants/home/*`)
| Route | Auth | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.../categories` | No | Cuisine types that have ≥1 **active** restaurant |
| `.../exclusive-offers` | No | Active offers on active restaurants; optional `latitude`, `longitude`, `limit` |
| `.../suggested-products` | No | Featured / highly rated menu items; `limit` |
| `.../nearest-restaurants` | No | Near-user list; optional `latitude`, `longitude`, `limit`; `isFavorited` true only with Bearer token |
| `.../latest-ordered-products` | **Yes** | Distinct products from user’s non-cancelled orders (reorder / اطلب مجدداً); `limit` |

**Distance**: Haversine runs on MySQL/Postgres, etc. **SQLite** (`phpunit`) does not compute `distanceKm` (values `null`).

## Success status codes (typical)
- `200` — OK (JSON body).
- `201` — Created (addresses, cart item, checkout order, group vote, first-time favorite add for restaurant/store).
- `204` — No content (delete address).
- `404` — Not found (invalid id, inactive marketing offer, wrong user’s resource).
- `403` / `401` — Forbidden / Unauthenticated (missing or invalid token).
- `422` — Validation errors: `{ "message": "...", "errors": { "field": ["..."] } }`.

## Pagination (Laravel)
- Paginated resources return `data` (array of items), `links` (`first`, `last`, `prev`, `next`), and `meta` (`current_page`, `from`, `last_page`, `path`, `per_page`, `to`, `total`, …).
- Query: `page`, `perPage` (camelCase in this API where FormRequest defines it).

## Media in JSON (summary)
- **Restaurant** `RestaurantResource`: `primaryImage`, `image`, `banner`, `images`.
- **Restaurant product** `ProductResource`: `primaryImage`, `images`.
- **User** `UserResource` (with `media` loaded): `primaryImage` / `images` as `MediaResource` objects (`url`, `thumbnailUrl`, …).
- **Marketing offers**: `imageUrl` (Spatie `card-image`) or `null`.
- **Supermarket** `SmStoreResource`: `cover`, `logo`; luck-box line items: `imageUrl`.
- **Supermarket order** items: product media via `SmProductResource` when loaded.

## Flow overview
### Register + verify
1. `POST /register` → OTP sent.
2. `POST /verify-account` → `user` + `token`.

### Login (SMS OTP)
1. `POST /login` → OTP sent.
2. `POST /login/verify` → `user` + `token`.

### Reset password
1. `POST /reset-password` → generic message; `expiresAt` null if phone unknown.
2. `POST /reset-password/confirm` → `message` + `token`.

## Examples in this collection
Each request includes a **saved example** (`Examples` in Postman) with a representative **200/201/204** JSON body. Adjust ids and tokens to your environment.

## Notes
- SMS/OTP is behind a provider interface.

request.description:
Creates a new user and sends an SMS OTP for account verification.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response body**:
| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `message` | string | Arabic confirmation that OTP was sent |
| `expiresAt` | string (ISO 8601) | OTP expiry time |

**Errors**: `422` validation on `name`, `email`, `phone`, `password`.

Verifies the registration OTP, marks the account as verified, and returns a Sanctum token.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response body**:
| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `user` | object | `UserResource` (see `me` example; media keys appear only if loaded) |
| `token` | string | Sanctum `plainTextToken` — save as `{{token}}` |

**Errors**: `422` invalid OTP / phone.

Checks password, then sends an SMS OTP for login.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: same shape as register OTP (`message`, `expiresAt`).

**Errors**: `422` wrong password (`phone` message) or invalid phone.

Verifies the login OTP and returns a Sanctum token.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: `user` + `token` (same as verify-account).

Sends an OTP if the phone exists (response is intentionally generic).

**Status**: `200 OK` always for privacy.

**Response**:
- `message` — Arabic generic text
- `expiresAt` — ISO 8601 if user found; **`null`** if phone not registered

response.name: 200 OK — generic (user exists)

request.description:
Verifies OTP, resets password, and returns a token.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**:
- `message` — Arabic success
- `token` — new Sanctum token (previous `user-api` tokens revoked)

Supermarket homepage: featured offers.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**:
- `offers` — array of `SmOfferResource` objects.

**Offer fields** (representative): `id`, `storeId`, `store` (`SmStoreResource` subset: `id`, `name`, `slug`, **`cover`**, **`logo`**, …), `name`, `description`, `offerType`, `discountValue`, `discountPercent`, `startsAt`, `endsAt`, `isActive`, `offerProductsCount`, `affectedOrdersCount`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`.

Optional query: none (see `HomepageRequest` if extended).

response.name: 200 OK — featured offers
response.body:
{
  "offers": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "storeId": 1,
      "store": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "سوبر ماركت النور",
        "slug": "al-noor",
        "cover": "https://example.test/storage/covers/1.jpg",
        "logo": "https://example.test/storage/logos/1.png"
      },
      "name": "خصم على الألبان",
      "description": "خصم على منتجات مختارة",
      "offerType": "percent",
      "discountValue": null,
      "discountPercent": "15.00",
      "startsAt": "2026-04-01 00:00:00",
      "endsAt": "2026-04-30 23:59:59",
      "isActive": true,
      "offerProductsCount": 0,
      "affectedOrdersCount": 0,
      "createdAt": "2026-03-01 10:00:00",
      "updatedAt": "2026-03-01 10:00:00"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Supermarket homepage: nearby stores list.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query** (optional): `latitude`, `longitude` — reserved for future distance filtering; currently returns active featured/rated stores.

**Response**:
- `stores` — `SmStoreResource[]` (`cover`, `logo`, ratings, address, …).

response.name: 200 OK — nearby stores
response.body:
{
  "stores": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "ownerUserId": 10,
      "name": "سوبر ماركت النور",
      "slug": "al-noor",
      "description": "توصيل سريع",
      "address": "شارع الرئيسي",
      "city": "حلب",
      "neighborhood": "الفرقان",
      "latitude": "36.20000000",
      "longitude": "37.15000000",
      "phone": "+963933000000",
      "email": "store@example.com",
      "cover": "https://example.test/storage/covers/1.jpg",
      "logo": "https://example.test/storage/logos/1.png",
      "averageRating": "4.50",
      "totalReviews": 120,
      "trustScore": 88,
      "warningCount": 0,
      "isActive": true,
      "isFeatured": true,
      "suspensionUntil": null,
      "createdAt": "2026-01-01 08:00:00",
      "updatedAt": "2026-04-01 09:00:00"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Browse stores (paginated). Uses `SmStoreFilterRequest`.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage` (default 20), `search`, `filter.*`, `sort` — see `Modules/Supermarket` filter rules.

**Response**: Laravel pagination + `SmStoreResource` in `data[]` (`links`, `meta`).

response.name: 200 OK — paginated stores

request.description:
صندوق الحظ — static restriction labels + supermarket category type options.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**:
- `restrictions[]` — `{ "value": string, "labelAr": string }`
- `categoryTypes[]` — `{ "id": number, "name": string }`

صندوق الحظ — suggests up to three bundles: `best_value`, `fastest`, `balanced`.

**Status**: `200 OK` (may return empty `bundles` if no match).

**Body**: `groupSize`, `budgetPerPerson` (required); `restrictions[]`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `searchRadiusKm`, `categoryId`, `storeId` optional.

**Response**:
- `budget` — `groupSize`, `budgetPerPerson`, `total`
- `bundles[]` — `label`, `labelAr`, `store` (`id`, `name`, `slug`, `logo`, `cover`), `totalProducts`, `itemsDescription`, `totalPrice`, `estimatedMinutes`, `lineItems[]` (`productId`, `name`, `quantity`, `unitPrice`, `lineTotal`, **`imageUrl`**)

response.name: 200 OK — bundle suggestions

item.name: Items (requires token)

request.description:
Paginated supermarket customer items (cart items).

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `200 OK`

Add an item to a supermarket cart.

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `201 Created`

Show a single cart item.

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404 Not Found`

Update a cart item (quantity / unitPrice).

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `200 OK`

Remove a cart item.

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Status**: `204 No Content`

item.description: CRUD for supermarket items (cart items) under the user module supermarket prefix.

request.description:
Supermarket order tracking for the authenticated customer.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if order not found or not owned.

**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Response**:
- `order` — `SmOrderResource` with `items` (product + media when loaded), `statusLogs`, `store`, amounts, `status`, `orderNumber`, …

Current authenticated user with `media` loaded.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Response**:
- `user` — `UserResource`: `id`, `name`, `email`, `phone`, `phoneVerifiedAt`, `moduleType`, `emailVerifiedAt`, `primaryImage` / `images` (when media present), `createdAt`, `updatedAt`

Account hub: same `user` as `me` (with `media`) plus unread notification count.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

**Response**:
- `user` — `UserResource`
- `unreadNotificationsCount` — integer

Partial profile update (JSON).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Headers**: `Authorization`, `Content-Type: application/json`

**Body** (all optional): `name`, `phone` — changing `phone` clears `phoneVerifiedAt` until re-verified.

**Response**: `{ "user": UserResource }`

For photo upload use **Update account (multipart)** with field `primaryImage`.

PATCH with `multipart/form-data`: text fields `name`, `phone` plus file `primaryImage` (image mime, max size per `UserAccountUpdateRequest`).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: `{ "user": UserResource }` — `primaryImage` populated after upload.

Change password.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Body**: `currentPassword`, `newPassword`, `newPasswordConfirmation` (must match).

**Response**: `{ "message": "Password updated successfully." }`

Paginated `database` notifications (`UserNotificationResource`).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage` (default 10), `page`, `filter[unread]=1` for unread only.

**Response**: Laravel pagination; each `data[]` item: `id`, `type`, `title`, `body`, `data` (optional `bookingId`, `timeWarningId`, `disputeId`), `readAt`, `createdAt`.

response.name: 200 OK — notifications page

request.description:
List saved addresses for the user.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**:
- `addresses` — array of `UserAddressResource` (`id`, `label`, `mobile`, `city`, `neighborhood`, `street`, `building`, `floor`, `directions`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `isDefault`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`). Default address first.

Single address payload for the edit screen.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404`

Partial update; at least one field is required. To change default, send `isDefault: true/false`.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `422` | `404`

Create address.

**Status**: `201 Created`

**Body**: `label` + at least one detail field (`mobile`, `city`, `neighborhood`, `street`, `building`, `floor`, `directions`); optional `isDefault`, `latitude`, `longitude`.

**Response**: `{ "address": UserAddressResource }`

Replace address (PUT). Route model `userAddress` scoped to auth user.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404`

**Response**: `{ "address": UserAddressResource }`

PATCH — set this address as the only default.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: `{ "address": UserAddressResource }` with `isDefault: true`.

Delete address.

**Status**: `204 No Content` — empty body.

If the deleted address was default, another address (lowest id) becomes default.

Paginated favorite **restaurants** for the authenticated user (`RestaurantResource`, same shape as discover).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage`, `page`.

**Order**: Newest favorite first (by `favorites.created_at`).

response.name: 200 OK — favorites page

request.description:
Add an **active** restaurant to favorites (idempotent).

**Status**: `201 Created` on first add | `200 OK` if already favorited

**Response**: `{ "restaurant": RestaurantResource }` (media, `cuisineTypes`, `primaryActiveOffer` loaded).

**Errors**: `401`, `404` (invalid id), `422` if `is_active` is false (message: restaurant not available).

Remove a restaurant from favorites.

**Status**: `204 No Content` — empty body (also when it was not favorited).

Paginated favorite **supermarket stores** (`SmStoreResource` with `owner` loaded).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage`, `page`.

response.name: 200 OK — store favorites

request.description:
Add an **active** supermarket store to favorites (idempotent).

**Status**: `201` first add | `200` if already favorited

**Response**: `{ "store": SmStoreResource }` (`owner` loaded).

**Errors**: `422` if store inactive (message: store not available).

Remove a supermarket store from favorites.

**Status**: `204 No Content`.

Platform marketing offers (paginated `UserMarketingOfferResource`). Public.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage`, `page`.

**Response**: `data[]` with `id`, `title`, `description`, `discountLabel`, `promoCode`, `startsAt`, `endsAt`, `theme`, `sortOrder`, **`imageUrl`**, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`.

**Media**: `imageUrl` from Spatie `card-image` or `null`.

response.name: 200 OK — offers page

request.description:
Single valid marketing offer (route binding applies `currentlyValid()` scope).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if inactive or outside window.

**Response**: wrapped `data` object (single `UserMarketingOfferResource`).

Restaurant app home: horizontal cuisine chips / filters.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**:
- `categories` — `{ id, name, slug }[]` — only `CuisineType` rows linked to at least one **`is_active`** restaurant, sorted by `name`.

**Controller**: `UserRestaurantHomeCategoriesController` → `UserRestaurantHomeCategoriesService`.

query.description: Optional; with longitude enables distance sort + distanceKm
Optional; with latitude enables distance sort + distanceKm

request.description:
Home section «عروض حصرية بالقرب منك»: one card per **active offer** on an **active** restaurant.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query** (optional): `latitude`, `longitude`, `limit` (1–30, default 15).

**Response**:
- `exclusiveOffers[]` — `UserRestaurantExclusiveOfferResource`:
  - `offerId`, `restaurantId`, `restaurantName`
  - `offerBadgeText` — e.g. `20%` from discount rules
  - `offerDescription` — offer `name` (detail line)
  - `discountType`, `discountValue`
  - `urgencyTag` — `limited_time` | `ending_soon` | `todays_offer` | `null` (`Offer::listingUrgencyTag()`)
  - `distanceKm`, `distanceUnit` (`km` when distance computed)
  - `imageUrl` — restaurant primary image

**422**: invalid query params.

Home «مقترح لك»: curated dishes (featured product + highly rated restaurant), not personalized by taste yet.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `limit` (1–30, default 15).

**Response**:
- `suggestedProducts[]` — `UserRestaurantSuggestedProductResource`:
  - `productId`, `name`, `rating` (restaurant `average_rating`, 1 decimal)
  - `displayPrice`, `originalPrice` (when discounted)
  - `currency` — `config('app.currency', 'IQD')`
  - `primaryImageUrl`
  - `restaurant`: `{ id, name, district, city }`
  - `tags[]`: `{ name, slug, kind }` — `menu_category` and/or `cuisine` (deduped by slug)

**422**: invalid `limit`.

header.description: Optional — when set, `isFavorited` reflects `favorites` morph for Restaurant

query.description: Optional; with longitude enables distance ordering + distanceKm
Optional; with latitude enables distance ordering + distanceKm

request.description:
Home «مطاعم قريبة منك»: restaurant cards with rating, cuisines, ETA window, optional discount ribbon, popularity flag.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query** (optional): `latitude`, `longitude`, `limit` (1–30, default 15).

**Headers** (optional): `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` — if authenticated, `isFavorited` is resolved from `favorites` (`favorable_type` = `Restaurant`).

**Response**:
- `nearestRestaurants[]` — `UserRestaurantNearestRestaurantResource`:
  - `id`, `name`, `slug`, `rating`
  - `primaryImageUrl`
  - `cuisineNames[]`, `cuisineSummary` (names joined with ` • `)
  - `distanceKm`, `distanceUnit`
  - `estimatedDeliveryMinutesMin`, `estimatedDeliveryMinutesMax` (from `estimated_preparation_time` ± buffer)
  - `discountOfferBadge` — from primary active offer badge text or `null`
  - `isMostRequested` — `true` if ≥5 **completed/picked_up** orders in last **30 days**
  - `popularOrdersCount`
  - `isFavorited`
  - `deliveryFee`, `isFreeDelivery` — currently **`null`** (no DB column yet); `currency` for future use

Without coordinates (or on SQLite tests): sort by featured + rating; `distanceKm` often `null`.

response.name: 200 OK — nearest restaurants
response.body:
{
  "nearestRestaurants": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Italian Chef Restaurant",
      "slug": "italian-chef",
      "rating": 4.5,
      "primaryImageUrl": "https://example.test/storage/media/r1/primary.jpg",
      "cuisineNames": ["Italian", "Pizza", "Pasta"],
      "cuisineSummary": "Italian • Pizza • Pasta",
      "distanceKm": 1.2,
      "distanceUnit": "km",
      "estimatedDeliveryMinutesMin": 20,
      "estimatedDeliveryMinutesMax": 40,
      "discountOfferBadge": "20%",
      "isMostRequested": true,
      "popularOrdersCount": 12,
      "isFavorited": false,
      "deliveryFee": null,
      "isFreeDelivery": null,
      "currency": "IQD"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Home «اطلب مجدداً» / reorder: distinct products from the user’s **non-cancelled** restaurant orders, newest first (one row per `productId`).

**Status**: `200 OK` | **`401`** without valid Sanctum token

**Query**: `limit` (1–30, default 15).

**Response**:
- `latestOrderedProducts[]` — `UserRestaurantLatestOrderedProductResource`:
  - `productId`, `productName`, `restaurantId`, `restaurantName`
  - `displayPrice` — **current** catalog price (respects `discounted_price`)
  - `originalPrice` — when on discount
  - `lastOrderedLineUnitPrice` — historical unit price from the order line
  - `currency`
  - `primaryImageUrl`
  - `lastOrderId`, `lastOrderedAt` (`completed_at` or order `created_at`)

Excludes **unavailable** products and **inactive** restaurants. **422**: invalid `limit`.

Discover restaurants (paginated `RestaurantResource`).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `perPage`, `search`, `sort` = `rating` | `nearest` | `fastest`, `filter[openNow]`, `filter[hasOffers]`, `latitude`, `longitude` (needed for `nearest`).

**Media**: `primaryImage`, `image`, `banner`, `images` per restaurant.

response.name: 200 OK — discover page

request.description:
Restaurant details (composite JSON, not a single API Resource).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404`

**Query**: `reviewsPerPage` (default 10).

**Top-level keys**:
- `restaurant` — `RestaurantResource`
- `offers` — `OfferResource[]`
- `popularProducts` — `ProductResource[]`
- `categories` — `CategoryResource[]` (with nested `products`)
- `ratingSummary` — `{ average, total, counts: { "1".."5" } }`
- `reviews` — paginated `ReviewResource` (`data`, `links`, `meta` when paginator passed)

Restaurant product detail + modifier groups for bottom sheet.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if unavailable.

**Response**:
- `product` — `ProductResource` (`primaryImage`, `images`, prices, `category`, `restaurant` snippet, …)
- `modifierGroups` — array of `{ id, restaurantId, name, isRequired, minSelections, maxSelections, modifiers[] }`

response.name: 200 OK — product + modifiers

request.description:
Add line item to restaurant cart (Sanctum).

**Status**: `201 Created` | `422` validation

**Body**: `productId` (required); `quantity` (default 1); `modifierIds`; `substituteProductId`; `specialInstructions`.

**Response**: `message`, `cartId`, `itemId`.

Vote builder catalog (public).

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Query**: `search`, `cuisineTypeId`, `limit` (max 50).

**Response**:
- `durationMinutesPresets` — int[]
- `cuisineTypes` — `{ id, name, slug }[]`
- `suggestions` — `{ id, name, unitPrice, restaurantId, restaurantName }[]`

Create group vote (creator = auth user).

**Status**: `201 Created` | `422`

**Body**: `durationMinutes` ∈ presets; optional `foodCategoryHint`, `cuisineTypeId`; `options` 2–10 items `{ label, productId? }`.

**Response**: `message`, `data` — same shape as **Show group vote** (`vote`, `options`, `voters`, `winner`).

response.name: 201 Created — vote

request.description:
Public vote state (refreshed for live UI).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404`

**Response**: `{ "data": { "vote", "options", "voters", "winner" } }` — see create-vote example; `winner` set when `status` is `ended`.

response.name: 200 OK — vote state

request.description:
Cast or change ballot (one per user per vote).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `422` if vote closed / invalid option.

**Body**: `{ "optionId": number }`

**Response**: `message`, `data` (updated payload).

item.name: End vote now — creator only (requires token)

request.description:
End vote early (creator only).

**Status**: `200 OK` | `422` if not creator or already ended.

**Response**: `message`, `data` with `vote.status` = `ended` and `winner` when applicable.

Checkout: create restaurant order from cart.

**Status**: `201 Created` | `422` business/validation errors

**Body**: `restaurantId`; `orderType` `delivery`|`pickup`; optional `pickupMode`, `pickupScheduledFor`, `promoCode`, `specialInstructions`.

**Response**: `message`, `order` — `OrderResource` (totals, `status`, `statusLabelAr`, `orderItems`, `restaurant`, …).

Paginated restaurant orders for auth user.

**Status**: `200 OK`

**Response**: `data[]` of `OrderResource` (`links`, `meta`); default `perPage` 20 in controller.

Single restaurant order (`OrderResource`) for auth user.

**Status**: `200 OK` | `404` if not owned.

**Response**: Laravel single-resource wrapper `{ "data": OrderResource }`.
